vllm.title: [Feature] specify model in config.yaml
vllm.author: wayzeng
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
CLOSES #14819
Run CLI:

vllm serve --config config.yaml with model in yaml.
vllm serve SOME_MODEL --config config.yaml: model_tag in CLI, takes precedence over model in config file.
If missing model in CLI and config file, will raise error.

Tests:
Unit tests:
✗ pytest test_utils.py

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Add int8 torch dtype for KVCache
vllm.author: shen-shanshan

vllm.title: [Misc] Add attention mask pre-computation optimization back to Qwen2.5-VL
vllm.author: Isotr0py
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
#15200 actually disabled the seqlens pre-computation for Qwen2.5-VL by mistake, because seqlens are computed for each layer again.
This PR adds the optimization introduced in #14377 back with correct implementation.
Determined that the regression test can still pass with this implementation.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix incorrect resolving order for transformers fallback
vllm.author: Isotr0py
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Make sure transformers fallback are always resolved at last. (#15023 (comment))

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix broken kernel test due to missing rename for v1 Triton backend
vllm.author: Isotr0py
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Fix broken kernel test due to missing renaming when rebasing #14071

vllm.title: [Misc] Add cProfile helpers
vllm.author: russellb
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This change aims to make it a little easier to profile sections of vLLM
Python code.
Two helpers for profiling: a decorator and context manager:
import vllm.utils

@vllm.utils.cprofile("my_func.prof")
def my_func():
    # expensive code
    return

def other_code():
    # more expensive code
    ret

vllm.title: [TPU][V1] MHA Pallas backend
vllm.author: NickLucche
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The torch sdpa F.scaled_dot_product_attention impl is particularly inefficient on TPU.
It's both slow and also causes issues when XLA compiling as reported here #15051, which is a major obstacle in multimodal adoption on TPU.
This PR adds a Pallas branch to the vanilla MHA module used in most ViTs.

vllm.title: [Build/CI] Fix env var typo
vllm.author: russellb
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The env var is VLLM_LOGGING_LEVEL, not VLLM_LOG_LEVEL. I just
happened to spot this while searching the code for log level references
for another reason.
Signed-off-by: Russell Bryant rbryant@redhat.com

vllm.title: [Misc] Increase RayDistributedExecutor RAY_CGRAPH_get_timeout
vllm.author: ruisearch42
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Execution in DeepSeek may take a long time, this PR sets a larger default (300s, rather than 10s) for RAY_CGRAPH_get_timeout, but still allows user to override it.
FIX #15199

vllm.title: [Bugfix][V0] Multi-sequence logprobs streaming edge case
vllm.author: andylolu2
vllm.bodyExcerpt: There's a bug when using logprobs with multi-sequence with RequestOutputKind.DELTA. When a sequence finishes before the others, it's output_token_ids on the subsequent steps will be an empty array, until every sequence finishes. This cases an [-0:] slice into the logprobs array, which returns the en

vllm.title: [FEAT] [ROCm]:  Add AITER RMS Norm (Layer Norm) Feature
vllm.author: tjtanaa
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR integrates the RMS Norm layer functionality from AITER (AI Tensor Engine for ROCm) into vLLM.
This PR is to introduce AITER RMS Norm layer kernel so that any up-coming optimization in AITER kernel could be directly use and evaluated within vLLM framework.
